project_description: Network configuration management system (Network Configuration Management). Automatic configuration backups for 3000 devices (routers, switches, firewalls), configuration diff, rollback, compliance check, ticketing integration (changes require a ticket), Web UI + REST API. Stack: Python + Ansible + PostgreSQL + React.
client_history: Configuration backups done manually via scripts — no consistency or change history.
risk_patterns: 3000 devices from different vendors — Ansible modules have varying maturity.
pm_comment: Old devices without Ansible support required custom SSH modules — 15% of devices.
